name: Mouse Hbb 130kb sub-TAD (ENCODE MEL CTCF + H3K27ac)
description: 130kb window spanning the full mouse beta-globin sub-TAD from 3'HS1 to HS-85. CTCF anchors from ENCODE MEL ChIP-seq (ENCSR000CFH / ENCFF142CNG, IDR narrowPeak, mm10). Enhancers from ENCODE MEL H3K27ac ChIP-seq (ENCSR000CEV / ENCFF078RJZ, replicated narrowPeak, mm10). Covers 4 globin genes (Hbb-bt, Hbb-bs, Hbb-bh1, Hbb-y) and the LCR (HS1-HS4). Cross-species comparison with human HBB config (hbb_95kb_subTAD).

enhancers.name: Hbb-bt_promoter_H3K27ac
enhancers.note: Strongest gene-proximal H3K27ac peak (signal 43.3), center of Peak_2766. Near Hbb-bt promoter.

enhancers.name: Hbb-bt_gene_H3K27ac
enhancers.note: H3K27ac peak at Hbb-bt gene body (signal 26.3), Peak_7226.

enhancers.name: LCR_HS1_H3K27ac
enhancers.note: H3K27ac at LCR HS1 equivalent (signal 35.2), Peak_2908. Matches literature HS1 position ~103,859kb.

enhancers.name: LCR_HS2_H3K27ac
enhancers.note: Broad H3K27ac at LCR HS2 (signal 18.4, 2.3kb wide), Peak_7713. Note: HS2 is strongest ENHANCER but moderate H3K27ac — consistent with active transcription vs poised state in MEL.

enhancers.name: LCR_HS3_HS4_H3K27ac
enhancers.note: STRONGEST H3K27ac peak in entire region (signal 57.9), Peak_2280. Spans HS3-HS4 junction. Major enhancer mark.

ctcf_sites.name: 3primeHS1
ctcf_sites.note: 3' boundary of mouse Hbb sub-TAD (conserved with human 3'HS1)

ctcf_sites.name: near_bt
ctcf_sites.note: CTCF between 3'HS1 and Hbb-bt gene, possible internal boundary

ctcf_sites.name: HS85
ctcf_sites.note: 5' boundary of mouse Hbb sub-TAD, ~60kb upstream of LCR (conserved with human HS5/HS-85)

genes.name: Hbb-bt
genes.note: adult beta-t chain (ortholog of human HBB)

genes.name: Hbb-bs
genes.note: adult beta-s chain (ortholog of human HBB)

genes.name: Hbb-y
genes.note: embryonic epsilon-y chain (ortholog of human HBE1)

_thresholds_note: Not calibrated. Will be derived from mouse ClinVar/MGI variants after initial run.

human_to_mouse_mapping.human_HBB: mouse_Hbb-bs/Hbb-bt (two adult beta genes in mouse)

_cross_species_notes.architecture_conservation: Mouse and human beta-globin loci share conserved LCR-gene-boundary topology: 3'HS1-CTCF | genes (developmental order 3'→5') | LCR (HS1-HS4/5) | 5'-CTCF boundary. Both are on minus strand with identical gene order.
key_differences: Mouse has 2 adult beta genes (Hbb-bs, Hbb-bt) vs human 1 (HBB)
Mouse LCR-gene distance ~30kb vs human ~55kb (more compact)
Mouse has HS-85 boundary (85kb 5' of cluster) vs human HS5 (65kb)
Mouse 3 CTCF sites in ENCODE MEL vs human 4 in K562
